ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been received and is now being processed.

Order Details:
• 1× Echo Dot (3rd Gen) – $49.99
• 2× Fire TV Stick – $29.99 each

Subtotal: $109.97
Shipping & Handling: $0.00

Total Paid: $109.97

Estimated Delivery: 3–5 business days

If you have any questions about your order, please reply to this email or contact our customer support team.

Thank you for choosing Amazon!

Best regards,
Amazon.com

For more information, visit <URL>.

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – HR Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear John,

This is an urgent notice from the Human Resources Department regarding your payroll account. Our records indicate that your direct deposit information is incomplete or outdated. Failure to update your details within the next 24 hours will result in a temporary suspension of your payroll until the issue is resolved.

Please verify and update your payroll account by clicking the secure link below and following the prompts:

<URL>

If you do not complete this process promptly, your upcoming salary will be withheld and you may incur additional penalties. This action is in compliance with company policy and is mandatory for all employees.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

HR Compliance Team

If you believe you have received this email in error, please contact the HR Help Desk immediately at <URL>.
